findings.description: STATUS INCONSISTENCY: Dashboard shows prod-cluster-eks as 'Degraded' but Clusters list, Detail page, and Settings all show 'Error'. The v122 normalization fix is not applied to the Dashboard cluster cards for prod-cluster-eks. test-cluster-minikube is consistent across all views (Degraded).

Nav cluster dropdown shows ⚪ (neutral) for prod-cluster-eks and 🟢 (green/healthy) for test-cluster-minikube, which is inconsistent with the actual status badges (Error/Degraded). Minor UI indicator mismatch.

Dashboard Production section header shows 'CRITICAL (1)' label while the prod-cluster-eks card shows 'Degraded' badge — the section label and cluster badge are inconsistent with each other and with other views showing 'Error'.

settingsNormalizedLabels: PASS — Settings shows 'Error' and 'Degraded' (not raw lowercase)
unknownStatusColor: NOT_TESTED — no unknown status cluster in environment

v122FixesVerified.sharedStatusNormalization: PARTIAL — 3/4 views consistent, Dashboard still differs
v122FixesVerified.detailPageFromDB: PASS — detail shows Error consistent with list
